verdicts.label: PANIC JUSTIFIED
verdicts.note: Your instincts were correct. Proceed to scream.

verdicts.label: FALSE ALARM
verdicts.note: Return to work. The danger was inside you all along.

verdicts.label: MILD CONCERN ONLY
verdicts.note: A normal amount of dread. You're fine. Probably.

verdicts.label: PANIC PREMATURE
verdicts.note: Save it. You'll need it for the demo.

verdicts.label: PANIC FULLY ENDORSED
verdicts.note: Even the diagnostic is sweating. Godspeed.

verdicts.label: OVERREACTION DETECTED
verdicts.note: Touch grass. Touch the literal grass.

diagnostics: Checking if it's actually on fire
